questions.question: Describe the primary function of a process scheduler in an operating system. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the role of process scheduling in OS

questions.question: What is the difference between a blocking and a non-blocking I/O operation in an operating system? Provide an example of each. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the concept of I/O operations and their types

questions.question: A process is created using the fork() system call. What is the new process's address space like, and how does it differ from the parent process's address space? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Understand the concept of fork() and its effects on address space
